race.comment: BLIND RAISE (2) has dominated in Victoria in his two appearances to date, the latest in the Listed ANZAC Day Stakes over this trip at Flemington five weeks ago. Trialled on 18 May to bring him up to the mark. Figures say he can take this next step. I AM DIRTY (15) has taken great strides in her two recent wins, the latest last Saturday when she easily accounted for her own sex in the Bill Carter over 1350m at Doomben. Wide draw the query but if it's heavy it may be a blessing. VANTORIX (1) had to dig deep to hold off MARTIST in the G2 Spirit Of Boom at Doomben a fortnight ago. Handles soft going and should get 1400m at the third run back. DREAM ROCA (14) has impressed at both runs this time in work and the extra trip looks to come at the right time.
